recommendations.title: Two Witches
recommendations.overview: A matriarchal witch passes on her sinister inheritance to her grand-daughter, triggering the most horrific curses.

recommendations.title: Tumbbad
recommendations.overview: India, 1918. On the outskirts of Tumbbad, a cursed village where it always rains, Vinayak, along with his mother and his brother, care of a mysterious old woman who keeps the secret of an ancestral treasure that Vinayak gets obsessed with.

recommendations.title: A Violent Separation
recommendations.overview: 1983. In a quiet Midwestern town, a young deputy covers up a murder at the hands of his brother triggering a series of events that sends them and the victim's family towards a shattering climax.

recommendations.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
recommendations.overview: Ten years after the events of the original, a reprogrammed T-800 is sent back in time to protect young John Connor from the shape-shifting T-1000. Together with his mother Sarah, he fights to stop Skynet from triggering a nuclear apocalypse.

recommendations.title: Tales from the Darkside: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A young boy tells three stories of horror to distract a witch who plans to eat him.

recommendations.title: A Dark Song
recommendations.overview: A determined young woman and a damaged occultist risk their lives and souls to perform a dangerous ritual that will grant them what they want.

recommendations.title: The House at the End of Time
recommendations.overview: The story of Dulce, a mother who has encounters with apparitions inside her old house. She must decipher a mystery that could trigger a prophecy: the death of her family.

recommendations.title: Constantine: City of Demons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: A decade after a tragic mistake, family man Chas Chandler and occult detective John Constantine set out to cure his daughter Trish from a mysterious supernatural coma.

recommendations.title: Ghost Dad
recommendations.overview: Elliot Hopper, a widower with three children, is working on a business deal to get his family out of financial straits when he is suddenly killed in a taxi accident. With the aid of a paranormal researcher, Elliott attempts to complete the deal from

recommendations.title: Don't Listen
recommendations.overview: After a tragic turn of events at the new home he's fixing up, Daniel hears a ghostly plea for help, spurring him to seek out a famous paranormal expert.
